changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app_places ( id Integer NOT NULL, apartment_mark character varying(20) NOT NULL, build_name character varying(50) NOT NULL, lat double precision NOT NULL, lng double precision NOT NULL, level_apartment character varying(20) , phone_number character varying(25) NOT NULL, place_name character varying(50) , special_mark character varying(50) , street character varying(50) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT app_places_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id) );
CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS app_places_id_seq INCREMENT 1 START 1 NO MINVALUE NO MAXVALUE CACHE 1 OWNED BY app_places.id;
